articles.title: U.S. military reaches deals with 7 tech companies to use their AI on classified systems
articles.description: The Pentagon says it has reached deals with seven tech companies to use their artificial intelligence in its classified computer networks, allowing the military to tap into AI-powered capabilities to help it fight wars.
